title: Metabolic fingerprinting of bacteria by fluorescence lifetime imaging microscopy.
author: Bhattacharjee A Datta R Gratton E Hochbaum AI
content: S-EPMC5473825 PMC5473825 Metabolic fingerprinting of bacteria by fluorescence lifetime imaging microscopy. Bacterial populations exhibit a range of metabolic states influenced by their environment, intra- and interspecies interactions. The identification of bacterial metabolic states
